data.body:
Enrichment from onboarding remediation brainstorm (2026-04-13):

Additional scope items discovered during onboarding feedback review:

1. README content regression: git log shows README.md was reduced to near-empty ('init' + ast-grep blurb) at some point in commit history. The gap audit (SC1) should include a git-blame analysis of README.md to identify what content was lost and when, so SC2 restoration builds on the original rather than starting from scratch.

2. CLAUDE.md template creation: plugins/dso/templates/CLAUDE.md.template does not exist despite being referenced by /dso:generate-claude-md (Step 2). Without this file, the skill generates CLAUDE.md from LLM memory, producing stale content (e.g., 'max 5 sub-agents' cap that no longer exists). New SC: Create plugins/dso/templates/CLAUDE.md.template derived from this project's CLAUDE.md with project-specific sections stripped and {{commands.*}} placeholders inserted. Template must be kept in sync with non-project-specific CLAUDE.md changes.

3. Bash/coreutils prerequisites: SC3 and scenario analysis already note bash >= 4.0 and GNU coreutils as blocking prerequisites. Confirming this remains in scope — the recent onboarding session hit errors because these were not installed.
